data.title: Niu Technologies Provides First Quarter 2026 Sales Volume Update
data.description: Beijing, April 6, 2026 - Niu Technologies, a global leader in smart urban mobility solutions, announced its sales volume for the first quarter of 2026. The company reported strong performance, maintaining its position as a top provider in the industry. Niu Technologies, listed on NASDAQ under the symbol NIU, revealed impressive numbers reflecting the demand for its products. This data signifies a promising start to the year for the Company, demonstrating its continued growth and success in the market.

data.title: At 6G@UT Forum, InterDigital to Demonstrate AI-enabled Teleoperation and Energy Efficient Edge Intelligence
data.description: InterDigital, Inc., a company focused on wireless, video, and AI technology research and development, is set to showcase groundbreaking developments in AI-enhanced services and energy-efficient edge intelligence at the upcoming fifth annual 6G@UT Forum held at The University of Texas at Austin. The event will take place on April 06, 2026, reinforcing the company's position as a leader in the field. Trading on Nasdaq under IDCC, InterDigital continues to push the boundaries with its innovative solutions.

data.title: K-679: A Novel Antibody Drug-loaded Unimicelle Conjugate Demonstrates Tumor-Selective Pharmacokinetics, Extensive Intratumoral Distribution and Superior Efficacy in Non-Clinical Animal Models
data.description: In Nagoya, Japan on April 6, 2026, Kowa Company, Ltd., based in Nagoya, Aichi Prefecture, shared news about the presentation of non-clinical data for K-679. This innovative antibody drug-loaded unimicelle conjugate (ADUC) boasts an exceptional drug loading capacity.

data.title: Litecoin's price nears $60 resistance with current trading at $54.02. Neutral RSI and resistance at $55.61 imply potential move towards $60.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Litecoin is currently trading at $54.02, showing a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) with a significant resistance level at $55.61. Technical analysis indicates a possible upward movement towards $60 if buyers manage to surpass the current levels. This suggests a potential increase in value for Litecoin.

data.title: Cosmos (ATOM) aims for $1.85 recovery as indicators show mixed momentum. Short term target: $1.78-$1.85, medium term: $1.64-$1.90. Bullish breakout at $1.87.
data.description: Summary of ATOM Price Prediction: In the short term (1 week), the target price for ATOM is estimated to be between $1.78 and $1.85. Looking ahead in the medium term (1 month), the forecast suggests a range of $1.64 to $1.90. A bullish breakout is anticipated if the price surpasses $1.87, indicated as the Upper Bollinger Band.
